articles.title: Garry Sobers, The Five-In
articles.excerpt: Sir Garfield Sobers, the batter, bowler and fielder rolled into one, has died at 89. His story is inseparable from the era of West Indian cricket, and Caribbean self-belief, that he did more than anyone to build.
articles.summary: Sir Garfield Sobers, the batter, bowler and fielder rolled into one, has died at 89. His story is inseparable from the era of West Indian cricket, and Caribbean self-belief, that he did more than anyone to build.

articles.title: Classify Coach, Not Individuals: Supreme Court Wants Railways To Drop 'Second
